subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord and my Support! Thou seest me turning away from all else save Thee and advancing toward the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و سیدی و سندی ترانی معرضا عن دونک و مقبلا الی افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for strength, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
